features: Lime Green Balloon Garland Kit: You will get 143 pieces latex lime green balloons. Package includes 4 x 18 inch balloons, 15 x 12 inch balloons, 100 x 9 inch balloons, 20 x 5 inch balloons, 2 x 10 m lime green balloon ribbons, 1 x balloon chain and 1 x balloon roll dispensing. It will certainly bring a great surprise, and the advanced sense of solid color will bring infinite possibilities to your party.

Premium Durable Material: The set is vacuum packed and the balloons are made of high-quality natural latex, which is thick and durable, the material is safe and not easy to break. Each balloon is rigorously tested and hand-selected by humans. They can be filled with air or helium and are recommended for use with balloon pumps.

Perfect Party Decoration: Our lime green latex balloon arch are suitable for many indoor events and outdoor occasions such as bridal shower, engagement, bachelorette, anniversary, graduation party, baby shower decoration and more. This set of balloons is suitable for taking photos to record and share your happy moments with others.

What to Fill: The 143pcs 18/12/9/5 inch balloon set can be filled with air and helium. Air-filled latex balloons stay full for up to 72 hours, while helium-filled latex balloons stay full for 3-6 hours.

Warm Tips: Please do not overfill the balloon and avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction. Strong winds or excessive beating may cause bursting. If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us and we will be happy to help and get back to you within 24 hours.
